items.title: Run macOS container machines locally
items.oneliner: Apple documents lightweight macOS container VMs you can spin up for isolated builds, testing, and reproducible local environments.

items.title: Try the Rust React compiler port
items.oneliner: Experimental React Compiler port runs about 3x faster than the Babel plugin and already passes the existing fixture suite.

items.title: Track Claude quota from the menu bar
items.oneliner: Tiny macOS utility shows Claude Code quota gauges in your menu bar, so you stop guessing remaining usage.

items.title: Build your own Async Rust executor
items.oneliner: Hands-on Async Rust tutorial walks through futures and executors by building the runtime pieces yourself.

items.title: Steal this HTML-first rebuild playbook
items.oneliner: Practical Astro case study shows how replacing a fragile React flow with HTML-first forms doubled completed usage overnight.

items.title: Use reducers to shrink failing tests
items.oneliner: Concrete debugging guide shows how test-case reducers cut huge crashing inputs into minimal repros you can actually reason about.

items.title: Self-host email from your own IP block
items.oneliner: Detailed walkthrough covers SPF, DKIM, DMARC, reputation, and routing for running your own deliverable mail server.

items.title: Query PostgreSQL with property graphs
items.oneliner: PostgreSQL 19 docs show read-only property graphs that let you model many-to-many data with graph pattern queries.

items.title: Turn text into charts with a font
items.oneliner: Open source variable font renders inline bar charts, sparklines, and pies without JavaScript, images, or charting libraries.

items.title: Build persistent LLM memory with Elixir
items.oneliner: Deep implementation writeup shows an OTP-based agent memory architecture that replaces brittle chat history and naive RAG.
